mano_cua.result_summary: 字符串单元格('abc')设置数据条条件格式后，触发 TypeError: createLinearGradient non-finite value（conditionformat.js:3842 → draw.js:3567），整个电子表格渲染崩溃变空白，无法继续操作。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: DevTools 控制台显示 Uncaught TypeError: Failed to execute 'createLinearGradient' on 'CanvasRenderingContext2D': The provided double value is non-finite。字符串'abc'无法转换为数值用于数据条梯度计算，产生NaN/Infinity传给Canvas API导致整个渲染崩溃。错误栈：conditionformat.js:3842 → cellRender(draw.js:3567) → luckysheetDrawMain → luckysheetrefreshgrid。
